sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33338" key="e)laiokomi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλαιο-κομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n33338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the cultivation of olives</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:140" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">140</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
